response.overview: Mastura is a kindergarten caretaker who takes care of preschool children. She is also the wife of Shazan. They live happily in the village and are well-liked by the villagers. Until one incident when she needs to go to the hospital for treatment, and an unwanted event occurs when she contracts HIV. From that point on, her life's journey changes, from being loved to being despised.
response.title: Matahari Tak Bercahaya
